value.legal_description: Lot 61, Section 2, INNOVATION TOWN CENTER, duly dedicated and recorded at Instrument Number 202403250014767 and platted at Instrument Number 202403250014768, among the land records of Prince William County, Virginia. AND BEING a portion of the property acquired by the Grantor by deed dated October 22, 2021 and recorded on October 25, 2021 in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court for Prince William County, VA, in Instrument No. 202110250121610. All of that certain lot or parcel of land situate, lying and being in the County of Prince William, Virginia and more particularly described as follows: Beginning at the northeasterly corner of the tract herein described. said corner being an iron pipe set on the southerly variable width public right-of-way line of Wellington Road, Route #674 and on the westerly line of the property of Northern Virginia Electric Cooperative (record information unavailable). Thence departing said Wellington Road. Route #674 and running with said Northern Virginia Electric Cooperative and with the properties of Alfred Paul Dugas and Johanna Maria Dugas. Instrument No. 200409290166144. Newington, L.C.. deed book 2866, page 584. Maria B. Magalhaes, instruinent no. 200202130021848, McDaniel Pods Realty. L.C.. Instrument No. 200603100040525 and Virginia Crane Rental Incorporated, deed book 1430. page 415 the following five (5) courses and distances: S28°03′04″E 371.67 feet to an iron pipe found: S28°33'30"E 148.74 feet to an iron pipe found; S28°22′52″E 824.73 feet to an iron pipe set: S31°46′08″E 232.89 feet to a fence post found and S31534'56"E 505.15 feet to an iron pipe found on the northerly line of the property of The Rectors and Visitors of George Mason University. deed book 2919. page 682. Thence departing said Virginia Crane Rental Incorporated and running with said The Rectors and Visitors of George Mason University S43°03'45"W 477.88 feet to an iron pipe found and S25°25'41"E 1042.25 feet to an iron pipe found, said iron pipe being the northeasterly corner of The Property of the Board of County Supervisors of Prince William County. Virginia, deed book 2428. page 219. Thence departing said The Rectors and Visitors of George Mason University and ruming with said Board of County Supervisors of Prince William County. Virginia S48°13′50″W 512 55 feet to an iron pipe found and S83°46'09"W 628.65 feet to an iron pipe found. said iron pipe being on the easterly 200 foot public right-of-way line of Prince William Parkway. Thence departing said Board of County Supervisors of Prince William County. Virginia, and running with said Prince William Parkway N23°52'26"W 2705.80 feet to an iron rod found and S55.29 feet along the arc of a curve to the left, said curve having a radius of 11.559.16 feet. a central angle of 4°14'22" and a chord which bears N25°59'37"W 855.09 feet to a drill hole set in a concrete ditch. said drill hole being on the aforementioned southerly variable width public right-of-way line of Wellington Road. Thence departing said Prince William Parkway and running with said Wellington Road the following four (4) courses and distances: N26°22'22"E 48.12 feet to an iron pipe set: N70°41′13″E 787.18 feet to a point: 417.63 feet along the are of a curve to the right. said curve having a radius of 668.94 feet. a central angle of 35°46'14" and a chord which bears NS8°34′20″E 410.88 feet to an iron pipe set and S74°15′26″E 161.83 feet to the point of beginning and containing 4.620.882 square feet or 106.08085 acres of land more or less.
